title: alaticaulia sprucei
side_effects: Alaticaulia sprucei can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in individuals with pre-existing conditions. Ingesting the plant's extracts can lead to nausea, vomiting, and stomach ulcers due to its toxic alkaloids. Prolonged exposure to the plant's sap or leaves may cause anaphylaxis, a severe and potentially life-threatening allergic reaction. Furthermore, improper use of Alaticaulia sprucei may also cause headaches, dizziness, and fatigue in some individuals.
